title: clerodendrum tatomense
intro: Clerodendrum tatomense is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the blue butterfly bush due to its vibrant blue and purple flowers. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may be beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clerodendrum tatomense include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum tatomense can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
